gene_region.label: NTRK1 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical NTRK1 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: NTRK1 encodes TrkA, the high-affinity nerve growth factor receptor that controls neuronal survival, pain-sensory neuron biology, differentiation, and kinase signaling.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local NTRK1 bundle spans neurodevelopmental/pain biology and somatic fusion oncology. Germline loss-of-function and tumor fusion contexts must be kept separate.
variant_effect_overview: NTRK1 loss-of-function can be relevant to congenital insensitivity to pain contexts when biallelic and clinically supported.
NTRK1 fusions are somatic oncology markers and require tumor assay context.
condition_research_overview: NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology
Congenital insensitivity to pain review context
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: NTRK1 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for NTRK1.
Because NTRK1 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use NTRK1 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions.
NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology
Congenital insensitivity to pain review context

biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an NTRK1 TrkA signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to NGF receptor signaling, pain-sensory neuron development, neuronal survival, kinase-pathway activation, or somatic NTRK fusion review. Germline and tumor contexts must be separated.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: NTRK1 fusion model is curated as a NTRK1 marker for NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology, Congenital insensitivity to pain review context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology
Congenital insensitivity to pain review context
research_context: Use this marker as a NTRK1 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair NTRK1 fusion model with NTRK1 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
